title: Grammys 2026: See the winners list - ABC News
text:
2026 Grammy Awards: Song of the Year

Winner: "Wildflower" by Billie Eilsch

The article reports on the Song of the Year winner at the 68th Grammy Awards ceremony held on February 1, 2026. The piece notes that all eyes focused on the four main winners, with Song of the Year among the major category awards recognized during the broadcast.

Billie Eilsch's win with "Wildflower" represents recognition of the songwriting excellence demonstrated in the track, which appeared on her 2024 album before being released as a single in early 2025.
